message.content:
@startuml
title Weekly Rewards to Vaults

skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #000000
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9F6
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ActorBackgroundColor #E9E9F6
  BoxBorderColor #000000
  BoxBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFFEDB
  NoteBorderColor #666666
  DividerBorderColor #000000
  DividerBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  DividerFontStyle bold
}

actor User
actor Ops

participant "«mStable»\nEmissions Controller" as EC
participant "«mStable»\nVaults" as V
participant "«mStable»\nMTA" as MTA

User -> EC : setVoterDialWeights ([dial ids], [weights])
EC --> User

note right of EC
proportions voting power across dials
for future distributions
end note

== After Thursday 00:00 UTC ==

Ops -> EC : calculateRewards ()
EC --> Ops

note right of EC
Calculates and stores
rewards for each dial
end note

Ops -> EC : distributeRewards ([dial ids])
EC --> Ops

loop [Dials]
note left of EC
transfer MTA
from Emissions Controller
to Vault
end note

EC -> MTA : transfer(vault, rewards)
MTA --> EC

EC -> V : notifyRewardAmount(rewards)
V --> EC

note right of V
Stream MTA to Users
end note
end

== After rewards have accrued ==

User -> V : claimRewards ()

note left of V
transfer MTA
from Vault
to User
end note

V -> MTA : transfer(user, rewards)
MTA --> V

V --> User

@enduml
